props.name: analyticsMetadata
props.description:
Specifies additional analytics-related metadata.
* `errorContext` - Identifies the error category and sub-category.

props.name: dismissAriaLabel
props.description: Adds an aria-label to the dismiss button.

props.name: dismissible
props.description:
Adds a close button to the alert when set to `true`.
An `onDismiss` event is fired when a user clicks the button.

props.name: i18nStrings
props.description: An object containing all the necessary localized strings required by the component.

props.name: statusIconAriaLabel
props.description: Provides a text alternative for the icon.

props.name: type
props.description: Specifies the type of message you want to display.

props.name: visible
props.description: Determines whether the alert is displayed.

slots.name: action
slots.description: Specifies an action for the alert message

slots.name: buttonText
slots.description: Displays an action button next to the message area when set

slots.name: default
slots.description: Primary text displayed in the element
